name: project-folder-deeplink
title: Project Folder Deeplink
description: Open a project folder with a specified tool
author: petr_lavrov

commands.name: open-dir
commands.title: Open dir
commands.subtitle: Open a project folder in selected app
commands.description:
Open a provided path with one of the following apps:
- Pycharm
- VSCode
- Sublime Text
- Finder
- Warp

arguments.name: path
arguments.placeholder: default: clipboard or current Finder dir

commands.name: open-dir-clipboard
commands.title: [Dev] Open dir from clipboard
commands.subtitle: Open the path from clipboard in selected app
commands.description:
Open the path from clipboard with one of the following apps:
- Pycharm
- VSCode
- Sublime Text
- Finder
- Warp

commands.name: get-dir-link
commands.title: Get dir link from clipboard
commands.subtitle: Get a Raycast deep link for the path in the clipboard
commands.description: Get a Raycast deep link for the path in the clipboard in the selected tool

arguments.name: path
arguments.placeholder: default: clipboard or current Finder dir

commands.name: sample-command
commands.title: [Dev] Sample Command
commands.subtitle: Open hardcoded path in selected app
commands.description:
Open a hardcoded path with one of the following apps:
- Pycharm
- VSCode
- Sublime Text
- Finder
- Warp

commands.name: open-dir-manual
commands.title: [Dev] Open dir manually
commands.subtitle: Open a project folder in selected app
commands.description:
Open a provided path with one of the following apps:
- Pycharm
- VSCode
- Sublime Text
- Finder
- Warp

arguments.name: path
arguments.placeholder: default: clipboard or current Finder dir
